title: Create Cobblemon Lite
description: Create Cobblemon lite is a modpack I had made for a server i wanted to run for friends and i thought why not let others play it. if the creators of create cobblemon see this i didn't mean to copy your name i just couldn't think of another and don't expect
body:
Create Cobblemon lite is a modpack I had made for a server i wanted to run for friends and i thought why not let others play it. if the creators of create cobblemon see this i didn't mean to copy your name i just couldn't think of another and don't expect this mod to go far.

the mods i have included are some of my favorite create addons which include Clockwork x valkerian skies, create big cannons and create steam and rails. all of which add to the industrious theme of create. there is the FTB quests mod which could allow for custom quests but i have not created any quests as of yet because i don't know how.

The Create mod is a mod similar to Immersive engineering in that it brings lots of new mechanics to minecraft that can automate certain aspects of vanilla minecraft and add on new things to create and automate. 

Cobblemon is A mod that turn pokemon into a much more familiar style fitting in better with modern minecraft it is similar to the pixelmon mod in that all of the same features are there but it is styled more for minecraft.
